captured_from: compliance/conformance harness — 5 generated `claude -p` sessions under ~/.claude/projects/-tmp-aoa-conf-* (minimal, bash-tool, edit-tool, iterations, agent) + 1 subagent stream (agent-a6afa089dd2c6736a.jsonl), supplemented by the live v2.1.173 repo session for surfaces the headless harness cannot drive (system / permission-mode / mode).

sample.note: Counts are intentionally not enumerated by type here: the harness generates small controlled sessions per surface rather than one large organic session, so per-type totals are not comparable to the 217-event v2.1.172 organic sample. system / permission-mode / mode / progress / file-history-snapshot were NOT triggered by the headless harness (manual surfaces); their shapes carry forward from v2.1.172/v2.1.173 and are marked inferred-unverified-at-178 below.

event_types.notes: No new top-level event types at v2.1.178. The set enumerated across the harness (assistant, user, attachment, ai-title, last-prompt, queue-operation) is a subset of the v2.1.172 set; nothing was removed or renamed. system / permission-mode / mode were simply not triggered by the headless harness.

agentId.notes: Links a top-level event to a spawned subagent — the value matches the subagent file shortid (agent-a6afa089dd2c6736a.jsonl) and the .meta.json. Falls through as an unconsumed envelope field (not in any probe path in parser.go). HIGH signal for L18 token attribution: it is the missing link that would tie a main-session Agent row to the real subagent usage instead of the char/4 estimate. Acknowledge-and-drop; candidate for L18 wiring.

attributionAgent.notes: Names the subagent TYPE that produced the event (e.g. general-purpose). Pairs with agentId. DROPPED — no probe path reads it.

system.pendingWorkflowCount.notes: Carried forward from the live v2.1.173 session — the v2.1.178 headless harness produced no system events, so this field is inferred-unverified at true 178. Per-session pending-workflow counter; cheap analytics. DROPPED.

system_subtypes.notes: No new system subtypes observed. system events were not triggered by the headless harness; turn_duration / away_summary / local_command carry forward from v2.1.172 (inferred-unverified at 178).

iterations.change: REGRESSION vs the v2.1.172 manifest: iterations was recorded as POPULATED at v2.1.172, but is EMPTY [] across ALL v2.1.178 harness assistant events AND the live v2.1.173 session.
iterations.notes: Likely now emitted only under specific session conditions (e.g. genuine multi-inference turns); the harness's single-inference turns never populate it. [DROPPED] in the contract, so non-breaking — but the 172 manifest's 'POPULATED' claim no longer holds at 173/178. The field is still captured into MessageUsage.Iterations and still unread. Narrative-only correction; HIGH-value-for-L18 status downgraded to conditionally-populated.

Agent.resolvedModel.change: NEW key on the Agent toolUseResult shape (10 keys at v2.1.172 -> 11 at v2.1.178).
Agent.resolvedModel.notes: parser.go matches the Agent branch on agentId/agentType, so the extra key is harmlessly unread. The Agent token totals are still present and correct (toolUseResult.totalTokens=8145, full usage breakdown), so the KNOWN SOFT SPOT is unchanged: AgentTotalTokens IS parsed (reader.go:306) and forwarded to ports, but app code attributes subagent tokens via len(summary)/4 instead — the ~10x understatement reproduces at 178 (measured 414x under on the agent scenario). Attribution leak, not schema drift.

Edit_create.change: NEW Edit/Write toolUseResult shape for file-creation results.
Edit_create.notes: A Write / file-creation result. Lacks newString/oldString. Still classifies as SourceTool=Edit via the structuredPatch/userModified/originalFile signature; EditNewString reads empty (genuinely absent), the new `content` and `type=create` keys are unread. Non-breaking.

on_disk.notes: No new on-disk artifacts vs v2.1.172. Subagent agent-{shortid}.meta.json sidecars persist; the agent scenario confirms one beside agent-a6afa089dd2c6736a.jsonl.

cache_creation.notes: TTL-bucket breakdown; flat cache_creation_input_tokens is the sum

iterations.notes: EMPTY [] at v2.1.178 and live v2.1.173 (was recorded POPULATED at v2.1.172) — see new_since_v2_1_172.usage_semantics.iterations. Conditionally populated; non-breaking ([DROPPED]).

tool_use_result_shapes_note: Bash, Edit, Edit(create/Write), and Agent observed live at v2.1.178. ToolSearch / TaskCreate / TaskUpdate / other carry forward from v2.1.172 (not triggered by the headless harness) — inferred-unverified at 178.
system_subtypes_note: Not triggered by the v2.1.178 headless harness; carried forward from v2.1.172, inferred-unverified at 178.
